# Bunigniter — LLM Context

Bun-native fullstack framework. CodeIgniter spirit × Elysia v2 × Edge-ready.
90+ commits, 85+ source files, 16 docs, 9 example apps, 28 CLI commands.

## Quick Links

- AGENTS.md: Full development guide
- README.md: Feature overview
- docs/user-guide/getting-started.md: First project from zero
- docs/user-guide/request.md: 16 input methods
- docs/user-guide/helpers.md: 14 stateless helpers
- docs/user-guide/services.md: 7 stateful services (Cache, Queue, Mail, Upload, Image, Session, WS)
- docs/user-guide/database.md: CI-style query builder
- docs/user-guide/template-engine.md: 3 engines (Rendu, MDX, React SSR)
- docs/user-guide/middleware.md: Creating middleware
- docs/user-guide/inertia.md: Inertia-style SPA pages
- docs/user-guide/cli-reference.md: 28 CLI commands
- docs/analysis/architecture.md: Helpers vs Services vs Middleware
- skills/: 9 focused skill files

## Key Files

- package.json: bunigniter, exports 35+ entry points (helpers/, services/, edge, view, router, db)
- src/index.ts: App boot, dynamic service imports (tree-shakeable via config)
- src/base/controller.ts: Controller base class with _before() hook, this.page(), this.load
- src/db/drizzle.ts: DbClient with CI-style query builder
- src/view/renderer.tsx: Template rendering (Rendu/MDX/React)
- src/router/file-router.ts: Auto file-path routing
- src/router/server-router.ts: Void-style defineHandler routing
- src/helpers/: 15 stateless modules (env, validator, jwt, cors, sse, schedule, request, etc.)
- src/services/: 7 stateful service classes (cache, queue, mail, upload, image, session, ws)
- src/helpers/load.ts: CI3-style helper & service loader (this.load.helper/service)
- src/cli/index.ts: 28 CLI commands
- src/cli/templates.ts: Shared templates for make:* commands
- src/cli/scaffold.ts: Project scaffold for bi new/init (reads external .tpl files)
- src/cli/templates/: External template files (config-app, todo-controller, json-db, etc.)
- config/app.ts: Single config file (db, services, middleware, views, router)

## Example Apps (all on port 3000)

- examples/simple-app/dev.ts: Welcome page (Rendu, simplest)
- examples/todo-app/dev.ts: Todo (React SSR)
- examples/hn-app/dev.ts: Hacker News (Rendu)
- examples/petstore/dev.ts: Pet Store (Rendu)
- examples/blog-app-html/dev.ts: Blog CMS (Rendu)
- examples/blog-app-tsx/dev.ts: Blog CMS (React SSR)
- examples/blog-app-inertia-react/dev.ts: Blog CMS (Inertia React)
- examples/hmvc-app/dev.ts: HMVC modules
- examples/slack-app/dev.ts: Full-stack Slack clone (recommended)

## Quick Commands

- bun run dev: Start dev server
- bun run seed: Seed database
- bun run test: Run tests
- bun run bi list: List routes
- bun run bi new: Interactive project scaffold
- bun run bi init: Scaffold into current directory
- bun run bi repl: Interactive console
- bun run examples/<app>/dev.ts: Run example app

## Architecture (3 layers)

- **Helpers** (`bunigniter/helpers/*`): `export function` — stateless, pure utilities
- **Services** (`bunigniter/services/*`): `export class` — stateful, needs initialization
- **Middleware** (`middleware/*`): `export default defineMiddleware((c, next) => ...)` — HTTP pipeline hooks

## Import Convention

Always use `bunigniter` — NOT relative paths like `../../src/`.
For services: `import { Cache } from 'bunigniter/services/cache'`
For helpers: `import { jwt } from 'bunigniter/helpers/jwt'`

## Config-Driven Tree Shaking

Set `services: { cache: false }` in config/app.ts to exclude unused services from build.

## Project Structure

```
routes/*.ts          → Controllers (extends Controller) + handlers (defineHandler)
views/*.html/.mdx/.tsx → Templates (Rendu/MDX/React SSR)
config/app.ts        → Single config
middleware/*.ts      → Global middleware (01_*.ts order)
modules/<name>/     → HMVC modules
helpers/            → User-defined helper functions (this.load.helper)
services/           → User-defined service classes (this.load.service)
```
